zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Eure於大約1387年出生在英國英格蘭達勒姆維頓勒-維亞爾時，他的父親Sir Ralph Eure11385歲，母親Lady Katherine Aton49歲。他於1406年與Maude FitzHugh在英國越可爾斯托可斯利結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1465年7月20日在英國諾廷加姆爾享年79歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Eure于大约1387年出生在英国英格兰達勒姆維頓勒-維亞爾时，他的父亲Sir Ralph Eure11385岁，母亲Lady Katherine Aton49岁。他于1406年与Maude FitzHugh在英国越可爾斯托可斯利结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1465年7月20日在英国諾廷加姆爾享年79岁。

nameMeanings.name: Eure
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Ewer
meanings: English (Hertfordshire, Middlesex, and Buckinghamshire): occupational name from Middle English ewere, a shortened form of ewerer ‘servant who supplied guests at the table with water to wash their hands’. The word ewerer is itself a derivative of Old French and Middle English ewer ‘water pitcher’, also recorded in Middle English as ower. Compare Lower .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Eure was born about 1387, in Witton-le-Wear, Durham, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Ralph Eure, was 11385 and his mother, Lady Katherine Aton, was 49. He married Maude FitzHugh in 1406, in Stokesley, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 20 July 1465, in Nottinghamshire, England, at the age of 79.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Eure est né environ 1387, à Witton-le-Wear, Durham, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Ralph Eure, avait 11385 ans et sa mère, Lady Katherine Aton, avait 49 ans. Il a épousé Maude FitzHugh en 1406, à Stokesley, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 20 juillet 1465, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 79 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Eure um 1387 in Witton-le-Wear, Durham, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Ralph Eure 11385 und seine Mutter Lady Katherine Aton 49. Er hat 1406 in Stokesley, Yorkshire, England Maude FitzHugh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 20. Juli 1465 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Nottinghamshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Eure è nato il circa 1387 nel Witton-le-Wear, Durham, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Ralph Eure, aveva 11385 anni e il suo madre, Lady Katherine Aton, aveva 49 anni. Lui sposato Maude FitzHugh nel 1406, nel Stokesley, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 20 luglio 1465, nel Nottinghamshire, England, all'età di 79 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Eureが約1387年にイギリスイギリスダルハムウィットオン-レ-ウエアルで生まれた時，父Sir Ralph Eureは11385歳，母Lady Katherine Atonは49歳であった。1406年にイギリスヨークシュアイアストケスリーでMaude FitzHughと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1465年7月20日にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアで79歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Eure(이)가 대략 1387년 영국 잉글랜드 뒤람 윗토-레-위르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Ralph Eure(은)는 11385세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Katherine Aton(은)는 49세였다. 그는 1406년 영국 요르크실르 스토케슬리에서 Maude FitzHugh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1465년 7월 20일 영국 노틴그함실르에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Eure nasceu aproximadamente 1387, em Witton-le-Wear, Durham, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Ralph Eure, tinha 11385 anos e sua mãe, Lady Katherine Aton, tinha 49 anos. Ele casou-se com Maude FitzHugh em 1406, em Stokesley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 20 de julho de 1465, em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 79 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Eure родился около 1387 г. в местности виттон-ле-вир, дурам, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Ralph Eure было 11385 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Katherine Aton, 49. Он женился на женщине по имени Maude FitzHugh в 1406 г. в местности стокесли, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 20 июля 1465 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 79 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Eure nació aproximadamente 1387, en Witton-le-Wear, Durham, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Ralph Eure, tenía 11385 años y su mamá, Lady Katherine Aton, tenía 49 años. Se casó con Maude FitzHugh en 1406, en Stokesley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 20 de julio de 1465, en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 79 años.
